name: scc
description: Sloc, Cloc and Code. Count lines of code in a directory with complexity estimation

options.name: --avg-wage
options.description: Average salary value used for COCOMO calculations

options.name: --ci
options.description: Enable CI output settings where stdout is ASCII

options.name: --cocomo-project-type
options.description: Change the COCOMO model type (allows custom models, eg. "name,1,1,1,1")

options.name: --count-as
options.description: Count a file extension as a language (comma-separated key:value list, eg. jst:js,tpl:Markdown)

options.name: --file-gc-count
options.description: Number of files to parse before turning the GC on

options.name: --format-multi
options.description: Multiple outputs with different formats (comma-separated key:value list, eg. tabular:stdout,csv:scc.csv)

options.name: --generated-markers
options.description: Identify generated files by the presence of a string (comma-separated list)

name: -i
--include-ext
options.description: Limit to these file extensions (comma-separated list)

options.name: --large-byte-count
options.description: Number of bytes a file can contain before being omitted

options.name: --large-line-count
options.description: Number of lines a file can contain before being omitted

options.name: --min-gen-line-length
options.description: Number of bytes per average line for file to be considered minified or generated

name: -d
--no-duplicates
options.description: Remove duplicate files from stats and output

options.name: --no-large
options.description: Ignore files over certain byte and line size set by --max-line-count and --max-byte-count

options.name: --no-min-gen
options.description: Ignore minified or generated files in output (implies --min-gen)

name: -M
--not-match
options.description: Ignore files and directories matching regular expression

name: -o
--output
options.description: Output filename (defaults to stdout if not provided)

options.name: --remap-all
options.description: Inspect every file and set its type by checking for a string (comma-separated key:value list, eg. "-*- C++ -*-":"C Header")

options.name: --remap-unknown
options.description: Inspect files of unknown type and set its type by checking for a string (comma-separated key:value list, eg. "-*- C++ -*-":"C Header")

options.name: --size-unit
options.description: Set the unit used for file size output

options.name: --sql-project
options.description: Use supplied name as the project identifier for the current run. Only valid with the '--format sql' or '--format sql-insert' option

name: -t
--trace
options.description: Enable trace output (not recommended when processing multiple files)
